description: Extend the existing check_consistency tooling with a hygiene report surfacing: floating aims, mega-parents (more than N direct leaf children = catch-all smell), orphaned cancelled/human-dependent aims, duplicate clusters (from the duplicate finder), and done-leaf ratio per subtree (candidates for archiving/collapsing). Gives a single dashboard of where the graph needs maintenance.

status.comment: check_consistency and fix_consistency now wired to MCP (were backend-only). The hygiene report extension (mega-parents, floating, done-leaf ratio, duplicate clusters) is not yet implemented.
